hooks.command: input=$(cat); cmd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE 'git\s+push.*main'; then echo 'WARNING: You are about to push to main — this is Caleb production repo. Consider pushing to staging instead.' >&2; fi; exit 0

input=$(cat); cmd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); output=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_output.stdout // empty'); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '^vercel deploy'; then url=$(echo "$output" | grep -oE 'https://[^ ]*\.vercel\.app' | tail -1); [ -n "$url" ] && echo "Preview deployed: $url"; fi; exit 0

input=$(cat); cmd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE 'git\s+commit'; then echo 'MEMORY_CHECKPOINT: A commit was just made. Evaluate if any decisions, preferences, or project context from this work should be saved to .claude/contributors/ profiles or _shared.md. Dispatch the memory-keeper agent if there is meaningful context to persist.'; fi; exit 0

marker="/tmp/claude-memory-mmw-$(whoami)"; now=$(date +%s); if [ -f "$marker" ]; then last=$(cat "$marker"); elapsed=$((now - last)); if [ $elapsed -lt 1200 ]; then exit 0; fi; fi; echo "$now" > "$marker"; echo 'MEMORY_CHECKPOINT: 20+ minutes of active work. Review this session for memory-worthy content: new preferences, decisions, workflow changes, or contributor observations. Update .claude/contributors/ profiles and _shared.md if anything meaningful was established. Skip if nothing notable happened.'

user=$(whoami); profile=".claude/contributors/${user}.md"; if [ -f "$profile" ]; then echo "CONTRIBUTOR_LOADED: $user — profile at $profile"; else echo "NEW_CONTRIBUTOR: $user — no profile found at $profile. After this session, create one based on observed preferences and skills."; fi; date +%s > "/tmp/claude-memory-mmw-${user}"
